database.name: VIEW SSPPINV_SUMMARY2_V
database.view: SELECT b.c_bpartner_id AS ssppinv_summary2_v_id, b.ad_org_id, b.ad_client_id, '100' AS createdby, now() AS created, '100' AS updatedby, now() AS updated, 'Y' AS isactive, b.c_bpartner_id, b.taxid AS bptaxid, b.name AS bpname, b.amount AS totalpending, (SELECT COALESCE(sum(si.amount), 0) AS "coalesce" FROM ssppinv_selectedinvoices si WHERE si.c_bpartner_id = b.c_bpartner_id) AS totalselectedinvoices, 'GPP' AS generatepaymentproposal FROM (SELECT a.c_bpartner_id, bp.ad_org_id, bp.ad_client_id, bp.name, bp.taxid, sum(a.amount) AS amount, '' AS invoiceid, '' AS docno, '' AS dateinvoiced, sum(a.doubtfuldebtamt) AS doubtfuldebt FROM (SELECT i.c_bpartner_id, CASE WHEN to_char('Y') = 'N' AND psd.doubtfuldebt_amount <> 0 AND fin_aging_isdoubtfultdebt(psd.fin_payment_schedule_invoice, date(now())) = 'Y' THEN fin_aging_invoicecurrency_rate(i.c_invoice_id, '100', i.c_currency_id) * (psd.amount + psd.writeoffamt - psd.doubtfuldebt_amount) ELSE fin_aging_invoicecurrency_rate(i.c_invoice_id, '100', i.c_currency_id) * (psd.amount + psd.writeoffamt) END AS amount, CASE WHEN psd.doubtfuldebt_amount <> 0 AND fin_aging_isdoubtfultdebt(psd.fin_payment_schedule_invoice, date(now())) = 'Y' THEN fin_aging_invoicecurrency_rate(i.c_invoice_id, '100', i.c_currency_id) * psd.doubtfuldebt_amount ELSE 0 END AS doubtfuldebtamt FROM fin_payment_scheduledetail psd JOIN fin_payment_schedule ps ON psd.fin_payment_schedule_invoice = ps.fin_payment_schedule_id JOIN c_invoice i ON ps.c_invoice_id = i.c_invoice_id WHERE psd.isactive = 'Y' AND psd.iscanceled = 'N' AND i.issotrx = 'N' AND trunc(i.dateacct) <= date(now()) AND (psd.fin_payment_detail_id IS NULL OR psd.isinvoicepaid = 'N' OR psd.isinvoicepaid = 'Y' AND (EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM fin_payment_detail pd JOIN fin_payment p ON pd.fin_payment_id = p.fin_payment_id WHERE trunc(p.paymentdate) > date(now()) AND pd.fin_payment_detail_id = psd.fin_payment_detail_id)))) a JOIN c_bpartner bp ON a.c_bpartner_id = bp.c_bpartner_id GROUP BY bp.ad_org_id, bp.ad_client_id, bp.taxid, a.c_bpartner_id, bp.name) b ORDER BY b.name
